A.J. Lawson

Anthony Randolph Lawson ▪ Instagram: ajlawson

Position: Shooting Guard ▪ Shoots: Right

6-6, 179lb (198cm, 81kg)

Born: July 15, 2000 (Age: 25-363d) in Toronto, Ontario ca

College: South Carolina

High Schools: St. Marguerite d'Youville in Brampton, Canada, GTA Prep in Mississauga, Canada

Recruiting Rank: 2018 (91)

NBA Debut: November 16, 2022

Experience: 4 years

Transactions

August 18, 2021: Signed a contract with the Atlanta Hawks.

October 7, 2021: Waived by the Atlanta Hawks.

July 26, 2022: Signed a two-way contract with the Minnesota Timberwolves.

October 14, 2022: Waived by the Minnesota Timberwolves.

November 15, 2022: Signed a two-way contract with the Minnesota Timberwolves.

December 7, 2022: Waived by the Minnesota Timberwolves.

December 26, 2022: Signed a two-way contract with the Dallas Mavericks.

March 3, 2024: Converted from a two-way contract to a regular contract by the Dallas Mavericks.

October 8, 2024: Waived by the Dallas Mavericks.

October 10, 2024: Signed a two-way contract with the Dallas Mavericks.

October 18, 2024: Waived by the Dallas Mavericks.

December 11, 2024: Signed a two-way contract with the Toronto Raptors.

April 12, 2025: Converted from a two-way contract to a regular contract by the Toronto Raptors.

October 16, 2025: Waived by the Toronto Raptors.

October 18, 2025: Signed a two-way contract with the Toronto Raptors.

April 11, 2026: Converted from a two-way contract to a regular contract by the Toronto Raptors.

Frequently Asked Questions

How old is A.J. Lawson?

A.J. Lawson is 25 years old.

Where was A.J. Lawson born?

A.J. Lawson was born in Toronto, Ontario.

When was A.J. Lawson born?

A.J. Lawson was born on July 15, 2000.

How tall is A.J. Lawson?

A.J. Lawson is 6-6 (198 cm) tall.

How much does A.J. Lawson weigh?

A.J. Lawson weighs 179 lbs (81 kg).

What position does A.J. Lawson play?

Shooting Guard.

What is A.J. Lawson's net worth?

A.J. Lawson has made at least $1,126,394 playing professional basketball.

How much does A.J. Lawson make?

A.J. Lawson made in 2023.

What is A.J. Lawson's Instagram account?

A.J. Lawson is on Instagram at ajlawson.

What schools did A.J. Lawson attend?

A.J. Lawson attended St. Marguerite d'Youville in Brampton, Canada, GTA Prep in Mississauga, Canada and South Carolina.
